prompt:
Create a premium modern e-commerce landing page.

Style:
- Luxury brand
- Apple-inspired minimalism
- Modern gradients
- Soft shadows
- Rounded corners (16px)
- Plenty of whitespace
- Premium typography
- Elegant animations
- Responsive

Sections:
- Sticky Navbar
- Hero with product image
- Call to Action
- Featured Products Grid
- Categories
- Customer Reviews
- Newsletter
- Footer

Color Palette:
Primary: #6C5CE7
Secondary: #A29BFE
Accent: #00D2D3
Background: #F8FAFC

Typography:
Inter
Bold headlines
Medium body text

Buttons:
Large rounded buttons
Gradient background
Hover scale
Soft shadow

Cards:
Glassmorphism
Blur
Shadow
Hover lift

Animations:
Fade in
Slide up
Hover transitions
Smooth scrolling

Images:
High quality lifestyle product images

The page should look comparable to premium websites like Apple, Nike, Stripe or Framer.
